photos.title: Mobile uploads
photos.description:
Note on timings for diwali puja
Dhanteras 
Today dhanteras will set in after 930 pm so dhanteras diya pujan shud be done after 930 PM

People who do dhanteras puja in office are advised  do it on Friday 13 Nov  before 5:58:35 PM when dhanteras ends. 

Choti Diwali/chaturdashi
Choti diwali diya puja will be normal after 6 PM

Diwali
On Sat amavasya will set on after 2:18 PM and accordingly diwali puja in offices ideally should not be done before that. Amavasya ends on Sunday at 10:36 AM.

Bhai Duj
Bhaiya duj is on Monday full day as Dwitiya starts from 7:05:04 AM onwards

Wishing everyone a very happy 5 days of Diwali and a wonderful corona free life ahead.

photos.title: Mobile uploads
photos.description:
Radha ashtami

Radha ashtami the janamdin of Radhaji comes 15 days after krishna janamashtami. Radha is actually elder than Krishna and it said 

Jo Radha janam na hoto 
To krishna virano roto
Na yo hoto krishna avatar 

In short there would hv been no krishna without Radha 

Our ancient culture (and I refuse to call it mythology) is full of examples of equal importance given to both genders there is ardhanadheswara (half man half woman) of shiva mohini roop of vishnu and same is krishna and Radha. Radha is the feminine side of Krishna. 

Even when we look at trimurti of brahma Vishnu Mahesh each has a feminine presence without which they cannot perform their roles effectively. The creator in brahma needs to knowledge Goddess Saraswati. 
The nurturer (palanhar) in Vishnu requires wealth for sustenance hence Goddess Lakshmi and the finisher in Mahadev requires power hence Parvati the Goddess of Shakti. 

Still above knowledge above wealth and above power is something that truly runs this world and that is LOVE and Radha is the epitome of love for Krishna the best (shrest) among men (nar). 

On this auspicious day of Radha Ashtami let's bow to the Sriji or radhe or shree radhe - the Goddess of love, tenderness, compassion, devotion in short an epitome of feminine qualities. 

Also let's bow to our wonderful culture which has so much respect for the feminine contrary to what we have been made to believe. 

Shree radhe shree radhe shree radhe

photos.title: Mobile uploads
photos.description:
She is a Muslim woman shah bano. Surprisingly she indirectly played a key role in ram mandir movement. In 1985, the supreme court of India ruled in favour of Shah Bano that she would be entitled to maintenance beyond the period of 89 days (iddat period). The then Rajiv Gandhi govt brought in legislation to overturn this SC decision. Now to do a balancing act RG govt allowed the opening of locks and Puja in ram mandir/babri masjid. This led to the uprise of ram janam bhumi movement. So in effect this Muslim woman played a key role in starting the RJB movement. Jai ho

https://x.com/SortedEagle/status/1168461058979160064?s=20

Interview of Arif mohd khan currently governor of Kerala, who was part of the then rajiv Gandhi govt in 1985 and had resigned protesting against stand taken by RG govt in shah bano case.

Also read this
https://kreately.in/shah-bano-to-ram-mandir-a-sordid-tale-of-opportunism/

photos.title: Mobile uploads
photos.description:
Krishna is known and reverred for so many things he did 

Ram is reverred for so many things he did not do

1. At the time of vanvas Dasharath asked him to revolt against him and take the throne - Ram didn't 

2. Laxman asked him to use his bow and arrow to stop the injustice meted out to him - he didn't 

3. His nanihal was very close to the jungle where he was staying never took any support from them

4. Bali had ravan under his belt, ram could hv taken his help and got Sita back but he rather killed bali as bali had forcibly overtaken his brother sugriv's wife and taking help of such a person would be against dharma - so Ram didn't take Bali's help

5. When sita was kidnapped all he needed to do was ask Bharat for help but he was in exile and it was his personal battle - Bharat was not even aware of the battle ram was fighting - didn't take help of his own brother 

6. After killing of bali and coronation of sugriv (around the month of June) the army was ready and willing to move to lanka but ram stopped it saying that monsoon had set in and waited for 4 months for chaumasa (rainy season) to get over - Ram ka dhairya

7. Could hv overtaken the kingdom from sugriv and vibhishan but didn't and made them kings. Till date India is the only major country which has never attacked or overtaken any other country. 

It is this quality of ram of doing the right things and avoiding shortcuts which we worship.

photos.title: Mobile uploads
photos.description:
How Ram can help in making tough decisions

Ravana had a boon that he could take any form he wanted.

One day his minister came running to him and said - why don't u use yr boon and become like Ram and Sita will fall for u.

Ravan gave him a grave look (saying I was waiting for u to gv me this idea) and said.

I already tried what you said but the moment I transformed into Ram's form the only woman I could think about was my wife Mandodari.

That's the power of the character (charitra) of Ram. In our life we all have seen just by playing the character of Ram how arun govil's life completely changed.

Coming to the heading next time you face a moral dilemma in life mentally think

If I was Ram what i would have done the answer you would get is the truth, the right, the dharma, whether u follow it or not is upto you.

Jai shree Ram.

photos.title: Mobile uploads
photos.description:
An ode to cricket - II

People (the earlier gen) had thought after gavaskar and kapil Indian their interest in cricket will come down and then came sachin in 1989 and changed everything. 

T20 wasn't exactly working in India and in came dhoni and won the 1st T20 wc followed by IPL and the game changed forever

After 2011 WC and Sachin's imminent retirement many felt chalo ab kya hi bacha hai (remember missing office and crying my heart out on the day Sachin retired) but then Virat and Rohit under Dhoni ensured that we stick on. The 2023 wc loss (it still hurts) seemed like the end of it and then within a year they bounced back with 2024 T20 world cup.
Then came Gambhir to ensure that all heroism comes to an end with V and R forced retirements from tests and many of us too started moving on but then comes this 15 year old lad suryavanshi who gets the disengaged ones likes us back into the game vying for him and wishing that RR wins the IPL even though none other than Virat is on the other side.

Suryavanshi is the voice of cricket telling people like us that

Abhi na jao chhor ke
Ke dil abhi bhara nahi
